nodes.name: Malaconotus
nodes.summary: Malaconotus（Malaconotus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联6种鸟类，如Fiery-breasted bushshrike、Lagden's bushshrike、Green-breasted bushshrike等6种鸟类。

nodes.name: Wildlife Conservation Society of Tanzania
nodes.summary: Wildlife Conservation Society of Tanzania是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Uluguru bushshrike，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 莫罗戈罗区
nodes.summary: 莫罗戈罗区是坦桑尼亞的一個地區，下分七縣。總面積70,799平方公里，2002年人口1,759,809。首府莫羅戈羅。 注释

nodes.name: 脊索动物门

nodes.name: Uluguru bushshrike
nodes.summary: The Uluguru bushshrike (Malaconotus alius) is a species of rare bird occurring only in the Uluguru Mountains in Morogoro Region of Tanzania. It was discovered in 1926 and was known to be confined to a single site in the Uluguru North Forest Reserve of about 84 km2. However, in March 2007, a team of Wildlife Conservation Society of Tanzania discovered its presence in the Uluguru South Forest Reserve in Morogoro Region. There are an estimated 1200 pairs remaining and the population trend is stable. See also Wildlife Conservation Society of Tanzania References External links Uluguru Bush-shrike found over the limit Uluguru Bushshrike Factsheet
